rows.label: xs33910100_MSG0010
rows.name: Mo-mo! We can't get close like this, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33910100_MSG0020
rows.name: Lin, do you think you can unlock it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33910100_MSG0050
rows.name:
It has multiple layers of protection. It
will take time to forcefully unlock it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33910100_MSG0060
rows.name:
Actually, it might be faster to search
for the barrier's release key itself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33910100_MSG0080
rows.name:
We should assume those Galdrs from
earlier are holding the release key.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33910100_MSG0090
rows.name:
Did they scatter and run away to prevent the
release key from falling into our hands?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33910100_MSG0110
rows.name:
Tatsu will not allow them to run off with
it, mo! Let's chase them immediately, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33910100_MSG0120
rows.name:
Yeah, if we find them, let's defeat
them and take the release key![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33910100_MSG0130
rows.name:
As expected of Lin-san,
mo! You're vicious, mo![ST:wait ]
